creator: araujobsdport@gmail.com
text:
Aloha,

There is a plist file wrong.
Could you fix it and resend the patch?

=== Checking filesystem state after all packages deleted
================================================================

but present after everything was deinstalled)

2475835        4 drwxr-xr-x    2 root             wheel
 512 Apr  4 18:53 usr/local/libexec/gcc
